---
title: "Publications"
title-block: false
---

::: {.page-heading}
Selected papers, newest first.
:::

::: {.pub-card}
![](assets/publications/objectivity.jpg){.pub-image}

<div class="pub-meta">Preprint / in progress · 2026</div>

### A Quantum Error-Correcting Perspective on Objectivity

Using operator algebra quantum error correction we provide a new way to understand objectivity that recovers previous approaches and goes beyond.

[Paper](#)
:::

::: {.pub-card}
![](assets/publications/mereology.jpg){.pub-image}

<div class="pub-meta">Preprint / in progress · 2026</div>

### Quantum Mereology

Using overlapping qubits, can we emerge space from a random Hamiltonian?

[Paper](#)
:::
